raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 371 protects undomesticated burros in the Reche Canyon region of Riverside and San Bernardino Counties.",
    "Reche Canyon is home to the largest population of undomesticated burros in California.",
    "The burro population in Reche Canyon has exceeded a thousand.",
    "Traffic collisions involving undomesticated burros have resulted in several fatalities over the years.",
    "Riverside County Animal Services is authorized to manage undomesticated burros but is often understaffed and under-resourced.",
    "There is a shortage of veterinary professionals to address the medical needs of undomesticated burros in the area.",
    "Senate Bill 371 allows Riverside County Department of Animal Services to provide additional assistance to the wild donkey population.",
    "The bill permits government animal service agencies to sign agreements with non-profits for assistance in managing undomesticated burros.",
    "SB 371 facilitates the safe removal of undomesticated burros from private lands and public roadways.",
    "SB 371 ensures that undomesticated burros receive medical attention when necessary.",
    "The bill allows local animal control agencies or affiliated nonprofits to relocate unfit burros to appropriate facilities or private adopters."
  ]
}
```
